episodes.name: Episode 1
episodes.overview: Liang Cheng, a famous singer, is nominated for two awards - but so is her rival, Mang Lanzhi. Meanwhile, on the digital front, streamer Herman (aka student Lu Jing) succeeds in his mission quickly so he can watch his idol's awards show.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/rkk398z6zxvb/love-scenery-s01e01-720p-10bit-web-dl-hindi-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Episode 2
episodes.overview: Liu Jing agrees to help a friend of a friend but doesn't know it is his idol. She is terrible but persistent. Sun BinYu is off in the backwoods filming. Liu Jing has fans. Liang Cheng visits campus looking for inspiration.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/0ro4u56zw78t/love-scenery-s01e02-720p-10bit-web-dl-hindi-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: Frustrated and unable to compose, Liang Chen escapes into the game. She finds out that her guide is Herman, a renown gamer, and that he is a fan of hers. Herman finds out that she collects items for him, not for herself.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/1qvxg28onthf/love-scenery-s01e03-720p-10bit-web-dl-hindi-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Episode 4
episodes.overview: Lu Jing learns that his idol likes watching his streams. He sees Liang Chen at a restaurant and tries to return an earring that she lost. Herman records a clip of her game-play for his collection.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/b2z4wjk9m3t2/love-scenery-s01e04-720p-10bit-web-dl-hindi-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Episode 5
episodes.overview: Liang Chen, inspired, composes something different. Liu Jing attends a masked party and is mistaken for someone else. A tipsy Liang Chen posts an after-party pic but deletes it the next morning. Liu Jing doubts what he saw, but wonders.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/4y88y46o1btj/love-scenery-s01e05-720p-10bit-web-dl-hindi-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Episode 6
episodes.overview: Lu Jing misses interacting with "Little Box" in the game but discovers coincidences, links between them at the school. He is now pretty sure that she is Liang Chen. Meanwhile Liang Chen tries something new but gets shot down.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/ftkmu5ju7qpz/love-scenery-s01e06-720p-10bit-web-dl-hindi-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>
